creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
Created attachment 243280
update net/cloud-init-devel to latest version

bump to latest HEAD

This brings some useful changes for FreeBSD:

- we now have a ds-identify rc script. This will speed up config-free
booting.
- https://github.com/canonical/cloud-init/issues/4193 is now fixed,
which gives us a clean boot on Vultr
- a previous fix was attempted with https://github.com/canonical/cloud-init/pull/2146
but https://github.com/canonical/cloud-init/pull/4222 now fixes it
properly

Sponsored by: The FreeBSD Foundation
